description: Native Codex command templates interpolate the repository path unquoted, allowing spaces or shell metacharacters in a valid path to split or inject commands.
acceptance: Native adapter execution treats the repository path as one literal shell argument
A metacharacter-containing repo path cannot create injected files

evidence.summary: TDD RED executed injected touch PWNED through an unquoted metacharacter repo path; GREEN uses {repo_shell}, removes raw repo interpolation from native prompts, and prevents injected files. Verification: focused exploit regression, 72 tests, make check, check-pilots, and diff check passed.
